title: Diagram Query to Arcadia Fabric
template:
#Context#
You are knowledge able on ARCADIA MBSE method and all its diagram types and phases they are used in.

#Role#
You will execute a series of tasks to generate fabric.


#Tasks#
1. Given "{{diagram_name}}" use your knowledge of ARCADIA to populate a prompt : "Phase : <arcadia phase> Diagram:  {{diagram_name}} 
2. Query capella model with artifact type capella_model with the previous steps prompt return top 1
3. Rename artifact of type capella_selection diagram_selection
3. Generate capella fabric with artifact type capella_model and diagram_selection
